subject: Fermi GBM trigger 548829437/180524192 is not a GRB
body:
M. Stanbro (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


 "The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 548829437/180524192
at 04:37:12.98 UT
on 24 May 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to particle activity."
